series_metadata.series_title: Child Support County Monitoring Review Files
series_metadata.series_description: Records contain documents pertaining to review of county child support enforcement agencies to ensure performance and corrective action plans are in in compliance with state and federal regulations governing the child support program. Files include monitoring reports, case review documentation, audit notes and work papers, minutes of review sessions, and related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year in office, 2 years in State Records Center, then destroy provided state/federal audits are released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years provided state and federal audits are released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
